title: El sillón y la gran duquesa
writer: Carlos Schlieper, Alejandro Verbitzky, Emilio Villalba Welsh
actors: Lucía Barause, Alberto Bello, Olinda Bozán
plot: A Russian duke who's fallen on hard times tries to recover a stash of jewels hidden inside an armchair, but the chair gets sold at auction to a millionairess and he's forced to marry her in order to retrieve the treasure.
